Case studies

Businesses growing with SuiteHub.

Measurable results, not marketing. These are real numbers after implementation. All our live clients today are in Panama; USA, Venezuela, and Spain enter soft launch during 2026.

Featured case · Workshop vertical

QS Express tripled their operational capacity in 4 weeks

Independent auto-repair shop in La Chorrera with 20+ years of experience, specialized in diesel systems. They migrated from Excel + notebooks to HUB Workshop (Pro Edition) and completely redesigned their intake, diagnosis and delivery flow.

QS Express
La Chorrera, Western Panama
tallerqsexpress.com
3×
More orders/day
0
DGI rejections
4 wks
To full speed
+40%
Revenue vs. previous quarter
Before
  • Orders in notebooks, copies in Word
  • No traceability of which customer brought which vehicle
  • Manual quotes via WhatsApp, no follow-up
  • Invoicing on paper pads, no electronic DGI
  • Parts inventory eyeballed
  • Appointments forgotten or double-booked
After SuiteHub
  • Intake in 30 seconds: plate → customer → complaint
  • Every vehicle has a full service history
  • Quotes as professional PDFs, shareable link
  • DGI electronic invoicing with official CUFE
  • Real-time inventory with low-stock alerts
  • Online booking: customer reserves, system confirms
"Within a week we were already issuing electronic invoices with zero DGI rejections. What I loved most: the SuiteHub team didn't ask us to change how we work — they adapted the platform to our flow, not the other way around."
Raúl Romero
Lead Technician — QS Express
SuiteHub stack used
Pro Edition HUB Workshop PAC Digifact Installable PWA
Real case · Laundry vertical

Clean Factory digitized their sneaker cleaning laundry

Laundry specialized in professional sneaker cleaning in Panama. They migrated from notebooks and paper pads to a system with digital orders, PIN-based time clock, electronic invoicing with The Factory HKA and a public delivery form connected to the backend.

Clean Factory
Shoe Cleaning · Panama
In production
0
DGI rejections
100%
Digital orders
PIN
Staff time clock
24/7
Online delivery
Before
  • Orders in notebooks, no process status
  • Invoicing on paper pads, no DGI
  • Staff attendance on paper sheets
  • Delivery orders via manual WhatsApp
  • Month-end close done by hand
After SuiteHub
  • Order with status timeline (received → washed → dried → ready)
  • Electronic invoicing with HKA, official CUFE
  • PIN time clock with CSV payroll export
  • Public delivery form → webhook into the system
  • 80mm thermal receipts at the counter, live dashboards
SuiteHub stack used
Core Edition HUB Laundry PAC The Factory HKA PIN time clock 80mm thermal receipt
Real case · Security services

KM Seguridad unified five service lines in a single platform

Panamanian company specialized in alarms, CCTV, monitoring, equipment installation and electric fencing. They moved from spreadsheets and notebooks to HUB Core, centralizing contracts, technical history per customer, maintenance scheduling and DGI electronic invoicing in a single system.

KM Seguridad
La Chorrera, Western Panama
In production
5
Service lines
0
DGI rejections
24/7
Active monitoring
1
System, not five
Before
  • Five service lines tracked across separate Excel spreadsheets
  • Paper notebooks for technical visits and installations
  • No unified record of what each customer had installed
  • Pre-printed invoice books, no electronic DGI invoicing
  • Preventive maintenance forgotten or notified late
  • Manual collections, no per-customer balance view
After SuiteHub
  • One system for alarms, CCTV, monitoring, installation and electric fencing
  • Customer profile with all installed equipment and its history
  • PDF quotes with one-click conversion to invoice
  • DGI electronic invoicing with official CUFE
  • Equipment and parts inventory with low-stock alerts
  • Receivables with per-customer balances and aging
SuiteHub stack used
Core Edition HUB Core DGI electronic invoicing Multi-service inventory Receivables
Real case · Distribution & technology

CVE Panamá centralized its identification & barcode catalog

B2B distributor of identification and barcode technology in Panama: standard and custom labels, ribbon, toner, packing tape, personnel ID, barcode printers and scanners, and technical support. They serve retail, wholesale, manufacturing, transport and logistics. They migrated from spreadsheets to HUB Core, unifying catalog, inventory, B2B quotes and DGI electronic invoicing.

CVE Panamá
Technology distribution · Panama
Live in production
5
Industries served
0
DGI rejections
100%
Electronic invoicing
1
Centralized catalog
Before
  • Catalog of labels, ribbon, toner and printers across separate Excel sheets
  • B2B quotes built by hand, with no follow-up
  • Stock per category counted by eye, with frequent stockouts
  • Invoicing on paper pads, no electronic DGI
  • Per-client purchase history scattered across email and WhatsApp
  • Manual collections, no per-client balance status
After SuiteHub
  • Single catalog (labels, ribbon, toner, tape, printers, scanners) with price and stock
  • B2B quotes as professional PDFs with direct conversion to invoice
  • Real-time inventory with low-stock alerts per category
  • DGI electronic invoicing with official CUFE via eFacturapty
  • Client profile with purchase history and installed equipment
  • Accounts receivable with per-client balances and aging
SuiteHub stack used
Core Edition HUB Core eFacturapty PAC Multi-category inventory Receivables
